zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde von Eschenbach於1172年出生在瑞士爾利望根時，她的父親Baron Walter I von Eschenbach23歲，母親Adelheid von Schwarzenberg32歲。她至少有7個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1249年在巴登阿赤 斯陶分哈特海姆享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde von Eschenbach于1172年出生在瑞士爾利望根时，她的父亲Baron Walter I von Eschenbach23岁，母亲Adelheid von Schwarzenberg32岁。她至少有7个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1249年在巴登阿赤 斯陶分哈特海姆享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Eschenbach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Eschenbacher
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of various places called   Eschenbach  .

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mechtilde
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde von Eschenbach was born in 1172, in Wangen, Zürich, Switzerland, her father, Baron Walter I von Eschenbach, was 23 and her mother, Adelheid von Schwarzenberg, was 32. She had at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1249, in Hartheim, Amt Staufen, Baden, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde von Eschenbach est née en 1172, à Wangen, Zurich, Suisse, son père, Baron Walter I von Eschenbach, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Schwarzenberg, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1249, à Hartheim, Amt Staufen, Baden, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde von Eschenbach 1172 in Wangen, Zürich, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baron Walter I von Eschenbach 23 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Schwarzenberg 32. Sie hatte mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1249 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Hartheim, Amt Staufen, Baden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Eschenbach è nata il nel 1172 nel Wangen, Zurigo, Svizzera, sua padre, Baron Walter I von Eschenbach, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Adelheid von Schwarzenberg, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1249, nel Hartheim, Amt Staufen, Baden, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Eschenbachが1172年にスイスズuリチワンジェンで生まれた時，父Baron Walter I von Eschenbachは23歳，母Adelheid von Schwarzenbergは32歳であった。彼女は少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1249年にバデンアムト スタウフンハースエイムで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Eschenbach(이)가 1172년 스위스 즈u리치 왕에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baron Walter I von Eschenbach(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Schwarzenberg(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1249년 바든 아트 스타펜 하테임에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Eschenbach nasceu em 1172, em Wangen, Zürich, Suiça, seu pai, Baron Walter I von Eschenbach, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Schwarzenberg, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1249, em Hartheim, Amt Staufen, Baden, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde von Eschenbach родилась в 1172 г. в местности ванген, зuрич, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Baron Walter I von Eschenbach было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Schwarzenberg, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1249 г. в местности хартим, амт стауфен, баден в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde von Eschenbach nació en 1172, en Wangen, Zürich, Suiza, su papá, Baron Walter I von Eschenbach, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Schwarzenberg, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1249, en Hartheim, Amt Staufen, Baden, a la edad de 77 años.
